title: vellosiella spathacea
intro: Vellosiella spathacea, also known as the 'Forest Sage' or 'Spathacea', is a flowering plant species within the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vellosiella spathacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions, teas, or decoctions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
